reasoning: The control 3.13.16 focuses on protecting the confidentiality of Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI) at rest. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that secrets are encrypted at rest, as well as ensuring that etcd, which stores cluster data, is encrypted. Additionally, applying pod security standards can help ensure that sensitive data within pods is protected by enforcing security best practices.
title: 3_13_16: 3.13.16 Protect the confidentiality of CUI at rest
